title: SCP-682, The Hard To Destroy Reptile
description: Don't come near him. You won't be able to defeat him, just die
body:
The Hard To Destroy Reptile adds a terrifying new monster. Its history comes from the SCP universe, where it is referred to as SCP-682, also known as The Hard To Destroy Reptile.


SCP-682 is an indestructible reptilian creature, impossible to kill. However, it can be slowed down by attacks. If SCP-682 breaches containment, it appears in its largest form, but it has five stages of size. As it is attacked, it gradually shrinks down to its smallest size. After a while, SCP-682 can regrow larger again, or it can kill something to growth. It is extremely fast and strong, with incredible regenerative abilities, making it impossible to defeat. 

## **Updates continue on Curseforge** ##

- A mod made by Zcoper
- Mod created with MCreator!
- Requires Geckolib

● Visit my Discord Server!
[https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ](https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ)



● Important FaQ

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>



► [OLD] What is my console spaming?

Most mobs use special spawning conditions, which means that these mobs can only appear under certain conditions. If the spawning conditions work, this spam is created in the console.

► [OLD] Why can't I summon a mob?

Spawning Conditions determine which conditions must be met in order to spawn certain mobs. Some mobs only spawn above Y level 60. Some below. Most mobs can only spawn in the overworld than in other dimensions.

► Why are features missing in different versions?

It is recommended to play the newest versions of higher minecraft versions.

Not all features of MCreator available or the same in different versions.
For example: Version 1.19.2 doesn't have the feature of shield, better structure generation or custom villagers, but Version 1.20.1 does have them.

► Where does SCP-682 spawn?

SCP-682 only spawns after it is breached. SCP-682 can spawn anywhere in the overworld like a normal monster. However, there can only be one instance of SCP-682 .

► How can I make SCP-682 breaching?

With a Creative Item you can force SCP-682 to breach if SCP-682 has not yet breached.

Additionally, you can also set the gamerule "doSCP682Spawn" to true so that SCP-682 can spawn.

► Can I kill SCP-682?

No. Unless you're using cheats or mods, SCP-682 cannot be killed by standard methods.

► Can I disable the shrinking/increasing size of SCP-682?

SCP-683's size change can be disabled with the gamerule "enableSCP683SizeChange" if this is set to false.

</details>



![SCP-682](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/56ffa0a7dd65141de25dbb5a2027e90cbd489f76.png)

SCP-682 is a massive, highly aggressive reptile that is unkillable without cheats due to its extreme regeneration abilities. It only spawns after escaping from it's containment facility. It spawns with a terrifying roar and attacks nearby mobs and players. When attacking, it now damages all nearby entities, making it even deadlier in combat. When enraged, it can jump and dash forward, allowing it to quickly close the gap between itself and its prey. When SCP-682 takes damage, it temporarily slows down, and its size can shrink in response to sustained attacks. However, it can grow back over time, or after killing a creature or player. SCP-682 has five size stages, ranging from small to gigantic, with its three largest forms capable of destroying blocks and letting out roars. The larger SCP-682 becomes, the stronger and more destructive it gets.

 

- Config File not inculed.
- You are all allowed to use this mod in your modpacks!
- Do not port my mods without permission!
